name: The Rock
reflection: When I feel weak, I can stand firm because He is my foundation.
hymn: I Know That My Redeemer Lives

name: The Light
reflection: Even in darkness, His light guides me.

name: Surety
reflection: I am confident in His promises, He stands for me before the Father.

name: Mercy
reflection: Through His mercy, I find forgiveness and hope every day.

name: The Good Shepherd
reflection: He leads me safely through life, caring for me personally.
hymn: I Heard the Voice of Jesus Say
